found_markers.surrounding_context: Now all the boats were in keen pursuit ... the imminent instant had come; then they heard, too, an enormous wallowing sound ... NEEDLE_ALPHA::AHAB-SEES-7429 ... come; they heard, too, an enormous wallowing sound as of fifty elephants stirring in their litter.

Although, when we had occasion to break out in the hold ... Although, when we had occasion to break out in the hold ... NEEDLE_BETA::QUEEQUEG-LANTERN-1836 ... As a general case, a ship unlucky in falling in with whales continues to cruise after them until she has barely sufficient provisions remaining to take her home.
